objects.description: [SPAWNCHIMERA](https://attack.mitre.org/software/S9024) has been compiled as a Position Independent Executable (PIE) to use a third-party library for injection.(Citation: Google UNC5221 BRICKSTORM SPAWNCHIMERA April 2024)
